description_long: This is a high-back executive swivel chair upholstered in dark brown leather or leather-like material, featuring plush cushioning on both the seat and backrest. The chair has a contoured, ergonomic back with a pronounced headrest and subtle vertical stitching that adds visual interest and structure. Its armrests are padded and covered in the same material as the seat, supported by sturdy metallic frames. The base is a five-pointed star made of metal, equipped with black casters for mobility. A central metallic support column connects the seat to the base, likely containing a pneumatic height adjustment mechanism. The overall design is modern and professional, suitable for office or conference room settings.
description: A dark brown, high-back executive swivel chair with padded armrests, a contoured seat and back, and a five-star wheeled metal base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, cushioned seat, tall backrest with head support, and padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's ergonomic contour, thick padding, and the metallic armrest support.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted back panel and the full width of the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the seat's depth, armrest structure, and the central support column.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical metallic column, likely telescoping, connecting the seat to the five-star base and supporting height adjustment.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, contoured backrest with integrated headrest, upholstered in dark brown leather, featuring vertical stitching and plush padding.
attribute_armrest_style: Padded, curved armrests covered in matching dark brown material, attached to the seat with sturdy metallic supports.
